## Summary

Adds `/admin/forensics/[jobId]` — a SIPOC Forensic View that traces every pipeline stage for a given evaluation job, answering the six-question standard at each stage (what enters, what leaves, who owns, what validates, what repairs, what prevents dirt downstream).

**Data sources** — reads from existing tables only (no schema changes):
- `evaluation_jobs.progress` JSON (timeline array, `pipeline_failure_envelope`, `pipeline_failure_diagnostics`, `chunk_routing`, `self_correction`)
- `evaluation_artifacts` (artifact types + creation timestamps)
- `pipeline_logs` (structured audit log per stage)

**API** — `GET /api/admin/forensics/[jobId]` returns:
```ts
{ job, stages: ForensicStage[], artifacts, timeline, selfCorrection, qualityGateChecks, canonCompliance }
```

Each `ForensicStage` includes: `result` (pass/fail/retry_pass/retry_fail/not_reached), `duration_ms`, `error_code`, `error_detail`, `retry_attempted`, `retry_succeeded`, `input_summary`, `output_summary`, and per-stage audit `logs[]`.

**Page sections:**
1. Job summary (status, route, word count, failure code)
2. Stage-by-stage progression table (click to expand — shows six-question panel + audit logs)
3. Self-correction policy metrics (attempts/successes/failures/quarantine/fail-closed)
4. Quality gate check results (if available)
5. Canon compliance table (authority references per stage, enforcement status)
6. Artifact inventory + pipeline timeline

**Navigation** — `forensic` links added next to job IDs in pipeline-health and dead-letter pages.

Styling: admin high-contrast standard (slate-900/800, white tables, red-800 error badges). Failed stages auto-expand on page load."

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/d4851c426d7b4c5eb439461fb11cc120
